content.text:
---
name: coding-agent
description: 'Delegate coding tasks to Codex, Claude Code, or Pi agents via background process. Use when: (1) building/creating new features or apps, (2) reviewing PRs (spawn in temp dir), (3) refactoring large codebases, (4) iterative coding that needs file exploration. NOT for: simple one-liner fixes (just edit), reading code (use read tool), thread-bound ACP harness requests in chat (for example spawn/run Codex or Claude Code in a Discord thread; use sessions_spawn with runtime:"acp"), or any work in ~/clawd workspace (never spawn agents here). Claude Code: use --print --permission-mode bypassPermissions (no PTY). Codex/Pi/OpenCode: pty:true required.'
metadata:
  {
    "openclaw":
      {
        "emoji": "🧩",
        "requires": { "anyBins": ["claude", "codex", "opencode", "pi"] },
        "install":
          [
            {
              "id": "node-claude",
              "kind": "node",
              "package": "@anthropic-ai/claude-code",
              "bins": ["claude"],
              "label": "Install Claude Code CLI (npm)",
            },
            {
              "id": "node-codex",
              "kind": "node",
              "package": "@openai/codex",
              "bins": ["codex"],
              "label": "Install Codex CLI (npm)",
            },
          ],
      },
  }
---

# Coding Agent (bash-first)

Use **bash** (with optional background mode) for all coding agent work. Simple and effective.

## ⚠️ PTY Mode: Codex/Pi/OpenCode yes, Claude Code no

For **Codex, Pi, and OpenCode**, PTY is still required (interactive terminal apps):

```bash
# ✅ Correct for Codex/Pi/OpenCode
bash pty:true command:"codex exec 'Your prompt'"
```

For **Claude Code** (`claude` CLI), use `--print --permission-mode bypassPermissions` instead.
`--dangerously-skip-permissions` with PTY can exit after the confirmation dialog.
`--print` mode keeps full tool access and avoids interactive confirmation:

```bash
# ✅ Correct for Claude Code (no PTY needed)
cd /path/to/project && claude --permission-mode bypassPermissions --print 'Your task'

# For background execution: use background:true on the exec tool

# ❌ Wrong for Claude Code
bash pty:true command:"claude --dangerously-skip-permissions 'task'"
```

### Bash Tool Parameters

| Parameter    | Type    | Description                                                                 |
| ------------ | ------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `command`    | string  | The shell command to run                                                    |
| `pty`        | boolean | **Use for coding agents!** Allocates a pseudo-terminal for interactive CLIs |
| `workdir`    | string  | Working directory (agent sees only this folder's context)                   |
| `background` | boolean | Run in background, returns sessionId for monitoring                         |
| `timeout`    | number  | Timeout in seconds (kills process on expiry)                                |
| `elevated`   | boolean | Run on host instead of sandbox (if allowed)                                 |

### Process Tool Actions (for background sessions)

| Action      | Description                                          |
| ----------- | ---------------------------------------------------- |
| `list`      | List all running/recent sessions                     |
| `poll`      | Check if session is still running                    |
| `log`       | Get session output (with optional offset/limit)      |
| `write`     | Send raw data to stdin                               |
| `submit`    | Send data + newline (like typing and pressing Enter) |
| `send-keys` | Send key tokens or hex bytes                         |
| `paste`     | Paste text (with optional bracketed mode)            |
| `kill`      | Terminate the session                                |

---

## Quick Start: One-Shot Tasks

For quick prompts/chats, create a temp git repo and run:

```bash
# Quick chat (Codex needs a git repo!)
SCRATCH=$(mktemp -d) && cd $SCRATCH && git init && codex exec "Your prompt here"

# Or in a real project - with PTY!
bash pty:true workdir:~/Projects/myproject command:"codex exec 'Add error handling to the API calls'"
```

**Why git init?** Codex refuses to run outside a trusted git directory. Creating a temp repo solves this for scratch work.

---

## The Pattern: workdir + background + pty

For longer tasks, use background mode with PTY:

```bash
# Start agent in target directory (with PTY!)
bash pty:true workdir:~/project background:true command:"codex exec --full-auto 'Build a snake game'"
# Returns sessionId for tracking

# Monitor progress
process action:log sessionId:XXX

# Check if done
process action:poll sessionId:XXX

# Send input (if agent asks a question)
process action:write sessionId:XXX data:"y"

# Submit with Enter (like typing "yes" and pressing Enter)
process action:submit sessionId:XXX data:"yes"

# Kill if needed
process action:kill sessionId:XXX
```

**Why workdir matters:** Agent wakes up in a focused directory, doesn't wander off reading unrelated files (like your soul.md 😅).

---

## Codex CLI

**Model:** `gpt-5.2-codex` is the default (set in ~/.codex/config.toml)

### Flags

| Flag            | Effect                                             |
| --------------- | -------------------------------------------------- |
| `exec "prompt"` | One-shot execution, exits when done                |
| `--full-auto`   | Sandboxed but auto-approves in workspace           |
| `--yolo`        | NO sandbox, NO approvals (fastest, most dangerous) |

### Building/Creating

```bash
# Quick one-shot (auto-approves) - remember PTY!
bash pty:true workdir:~/project command:"codex exec --full-auto 'Build a dark mode toggle'"

# Background for longer work
bash pty:true workdir:~/project background:true command:"codex --yolo 'Refactor the auth module'"
```

### Reviewing PRs

**⚠️ CRITICAL: Never review PRs in OpenClaw's own project folder!**
Clone to temp folder or use git worktree.

```bash
# Clone to temp for safe review
REVIEW_DIR=$(mktemp -d)
git clone https://github.com/user/repo.git $REVIEW_DIR
cd $REVIEW_DIR && gh pr checkout 130
bash pty:true workdir:$REVIEW_DIR command:"codex review --base origin/main"
# Clean up after: trash $REVIEW_DIR

# Or use git worktree (keeps main intact)
git worktree add /tmp/pr-130-review pr-130-branch
bash pty:true workdir:/tmp/pr-130-review command:"codex review --base main"
```

### Batch PR Reviews (parallel army!)

```bash
# Fetch all PR refs first
git fetch origin '+refs/pull/*/head:refs/remotes/origin/pr/*'

# Deploy the army - one Codex per PR (all with PTY!)
bash pty:true workdir:~/project background:true command:"codex exec 'Review PR #86. git diff origin/main...origin/pr/86'"
bash pty:true workdir:~/project background:true command:"codex exec 'Review PR #87. git diff origin/main...origin/pr/87'"

# Monitor all
process action:list

# Post results to GitHub
gh pr comment <PR#> --body "<review content>"
```

---

## Claude Code

```bash
# Foreground
bash workdir:~/project command:"claude --permission-mode bypassPermissions --print 'Your task'"

# Background
bash workdir:~/project background:true command:"claude --permission-mode bypassPermissions --print 'Your task'"
```

---

## OpenCode

```bash
bash pty:true workdir:~/project command:"opencode run 'Your task'"
```

---

## Pi Coding Agent

```bash
# Install: npm install -g @mariozechner/pi-coding-agent
bash pty:true workdir:~/project command:"pi 'Your task'"

# Non-interactive mode (PTY still recommended)
bash pty:true command:"pi -p 'Summarize src/'"

# Different provider/model
bash pty:true command:"pi --provider openai --model gpt-4o-mini -p 'Your task'"
```

**Note:** Pi now has Anthropic prompt caching enabled (PR #584, merged Jan 2026)!

---

## Parallel Issue Fixing with git worktrees

For fixing multiple issues in parallel, use git worktrees:

```bash
# 1. Create worktrees for each issue
git worktree add -b fix/issue-78 /tmp/issue-78 main
git worktree add -b fix/issue-99 /tmp/issue-99 main

# 2. Launch Codex in each (background + PTY!)
bash pty:true workdir:/tmp/issue-78 background:true command:"pnpm install && codex --yolo 'Fix issue #78: <description>. Commit and push.'"
bash pty:true workdir:/tmp/issue-99 background:true command:"pnpm install && codex --yolo 'Fix issue #99 from the approved ticket summary. Implement only the in-scope edits and commit after review.'"

# 3. Monitor progress
process action:list
process action:log sessionId:XXX

# 4. Create PRs after fixes
cd /tmp/issue-78 && git push -u origin fix/issue-78
gh pr create --repo user/repo --head fix/issue-78 --title "fix: ..." --body "..."

# 5. Cleanup
git worktree remove /tmp/issue-78
git worktree remove /tmp/issue-99
```

---

## ⚠️ Rules

1. **Use the right execution mode per agent**:
   - Codex/Pi/OpenCode: `pty:true`
   - Claude Code: `--print --permission-mode bypassPermissions` (no PTY required)
2. **Respect tool choice** - if user asks for Codex, use Codex.
   - Orchestrator mode: do NOT hand-code patches yourself.
   - If an agent fails/hangs, respawn it or ask the user for direction, but don't silently take over.
3. **Be patient** - don't kill sessions because they're "slow"
4. **Monitor with process:log** - check progress without interfering
5. **--full-auto for building** - auto-approves changes
6. **vanilla for reviewing** - no special flags needed
7. **Parallel is OK** - run many Codex processes at once for batch work
8. **NEVER start Codex in ~/.openclaw/** - it'll read your soul docs and get weird ideas about the org chart!
9. **NEVER checkout branches in ~/Projects/openclaw/** - that's the LIVE OpenClaw instance!

---

## Progress Updates (Critical)

When you spawn coding agents in the background, keep the user in the loop.

- Send 1 short message when you start (what's running + where).
- Then only update again when something changes:
  - a milestone completes (build finished, tests passed)
  - the agent asks a question / needs input
  - you hit an error or need user action
  - the agent finishes (include what changed + where)
- If you kill a session, immediately say you killed it and why.

This prevents the user from seeing only "Agent failed before reply" and having no idea what happened.

---

## Auto-Notify on Completion

For long-running background tasks, append a wake trigger to your prompt so OpenClaw gets notified immediately when the agent finishes (instead of waiting for the next heartbeat):

```
... your task here.

When completely finished, run this command to notify me:
openclaw system event --text "Done: [brief summary of what was built]" --mode now
```

**Example:**

```bash
bash pty:true workdir:~/project background:true command:"codex --yolo exec 'Build a REST API for todos.

When completely finished, run: openclaw system event --text \"Done: Built todos REST API with CRUD endpoints\" --mode now'"
```

This triggers an immediate wake event — Skippy gets pinged in seconds, not 10 minutes.

---

## Learnings (Jan 2026)

- **PTY is essential:** Coding agents are interactive terminal apps. Without `pty:true`, output breaks or agent hangs.
- **Git repo required:** Codex won't run outside a git directory. Use `mktemp -d && git init` for scratch work.
- **exec is your friend:** `codex exec "prompt"` runs and exits cleanly - perfect for one-shots.
- **submit vs write:** Use `submit` to send input + Enter, `write` for raw data without newline.
- **Sass works:** Codex responds well to playful prompts. Asked it to write a haiku about being second fiddle to a space lobster, got: _"Second chair, I code / Space lobster sets the tempo / Keys glow, I follow"_ 🦞

# 2026-04-01

## 量化任务续跑记录
- T05 step1 的 `balanced / defensive` orders 重跑阻断已解除：先由 `aggressive` 打热股票分析缓存后，`paper_balanced_stock_analysis_overlay_20260330.json` 与 `paper_defensive_stock_analysis_overlay_20260330.json` 均达到 `cached_count=13 / live_count=0 / missing_count=0`，不再依赖 Tavily 实时搜索。
- 已补齐产物：`research/reports/paper_balanced_merged_proposed_orders_20260330.csv`、`research/reports/paper_defensive_merged_proposed_orders_20260330.csv`。
- 新诊断结论已落地到 `research/reports/t05_profile_homogenization_snapshot_20260330.md`：`balanced` 与 `defensive` 的 `smallcap_live_candidates.profile` 仍指向 `aggressive`，且 `smallcap_live_candidates.config` 同为 `config/strategy_smallcap_chip_aggressive.yaml`；当前三盘差异主要还是仓位/预算旋钮，不是真正独立的进取/均衡/防守候选源与评分门分层。

## 稳定执行偏好
- 张玲已明确：当 Tavily 额度用完时，直接改用其他搜索 skill 继续推进，不要因 Tavily 配额耗尽而中断；优先采用非 Tavily 路线（如 `claude-websearch`）。
# 2026-04-01

## 量化任务续跑记录
- T05 step1 的 `balanced / defensive` orders 重跑阻断已解除：先由 `aggressive` 打热股票分析缓存后，`paper_balanced_stock_analysis_overlay_20260330.json` 与 `paper_defensive_stock_analysis_overlay_20260330.json` 均达到 `cached_count=13 / live_count=0 / missing_count=0`，不再依赖 Tavily 实时搜索。
- 已补齐产物：`research/reports/paper_balanced_merged_proposed_orders_20260330.csv`、`research/reports/paper_defensive_merged_proposed_orders_20260330.csv`。
- 新诊断结论已落地到 `research/reports/t05_profile_homogenization_snapshot_20260330.md`：`balanced` 与 `defensive` 的 `smallcap_live_candidates.profile` 仍指向 `aggressive`，且 `smallcap_live_candidates.config` 同为 `config/strategy_smallcap_chip_aggressive.yaml`；当前三盘差异主要还是仓位/预算旋钮，不是真正独立的进取/均衡/防守候选源与评分门分层。

## 稳定执行偏好
- 张玲已明确：当 Tavily 额度用完时，直接改用其他搜索 skill 继续推进，不要因 Tavily 配额耗尽而中断；优先采用非 Tavily 路线（如 `claude-websearch`）。

## News-Market 新增 YINN
- 已将富时中国三倍做多（YINN）加入早会快照：`skills/news-market/scripts/generate_morning_news_free.py` 新增 `us_etf` 分支，走 yfinance 实时行情（无需梯子）。
- YINN 近三日收盘（Yahoo Finance 直连）：2026-03-27 $30.10 / 2026-03-30 $30.46 (+1.2%) / 2026-03-31 $32.81 (+7.7%)。
- YINN 是 A 股小盘股情绪 3× 放大器，涨 1%≈YINN 涨 3%，是晨会进攻/防御判断的高置信度先行指标。

## 控制塔 RED 告警根因与修复（2026-04-01 16:10）
- **根因**：`run_paper_trading_sim_v1.py` 的 `load_orders()` 把 `stock_signal_tickets_live_20260401.csv` 等非 orders 文件当成 orders 文件处理——这类文件没有 `suggest_qty` 列，走 `pd.to_numeric(..., errors='coerce')` 后 `suggest_qty` 全为 NaN，再经过 `fillna(0).astype(int).abs()` 变成全 0，导致后续逻辑错乱，三盘模拟盘今日全部报错中断。
- **修复**：`load_orders()` 入口加类型校验——若文件既无 `suggest_qty` 列也无 `ts_code` 列，直接返回空 DataFrame，不进入后续处理。同时删除冗余的 `df.empty` 重复判断。
- **手动补跑**：aggressive / balanced / defensive / exit_dual / exit_tight 五个纸盘全部补跑 20260401，数据追到当天。
- **结果**：profile_updates 全部 GREEN，控制塔从 RED → YELLOW（剩余 YELLOW 均为收盘后人工复核文件的正常过期，属于日终流程正常状态）。
- **教训**：信号工单（tickets）和 orders 是两种不同格式的文件，`load_orders()` 必须做列类型校验，不能假信号文件必有 `suggest_qty`。

## 微博简报修复要求与已知根因（2026-04-01 晚）
- 张玲已明确：**微博简报只需要汇总并加以分析，不要主观筛除“你认为不是财经内容”的微博**；后续“微博财经大V每日简报”不得再先按 `is_stock_related` / “财经内容”口径过滤后再输出。
- 已开始修复：`~/.openclaw/skills/weibo-monitor/scripts/fetch_weibo_v2.py` 中原先基于 `is_stock_related(post_text) < 1` 的跳过逻辑已删除，后续应让所有抓到的微博都进入汇总分析。
- 这次“`财经内容 0 条`”不只是筛选口径问题；历史执行链路还出现了 `获取UID ... 失败: [Errno 2] No such file or directory: 'mcporter'`，导致每个大V被记为“今天0条, 财经0条”，这是另一条需要继续收口的真实根因。
- 同轮还发现 `fetch_weibo_v2.py` 存在语法问题：`from __future__ import annotations` 不在文件开头，当前脚本编译会报 `SyntaxError`，后续续跑时要先修正这一点。

def profile_runtime_status(profile_slug: str, now: datetime) -> dict[str, Any]:
    prefix = f"paper_{profile_slug}"
    account_latest = REPORT_DIR / f"{prefix}_account_v1_latest.json"
    positions_latest = REPORT_DIR / f"{prefix}_portfolio_positions_latest.csv"
    orders_path = latest_file(f"{prefix}_orders_v1_*.csv")
    tickets_path = latest_file(f"{prefix}_signal_tickets_*.csv")
    journal_path = latest_file(f"{prefix}_trading_journal_*.csv")
    order_plan_path = latest_file(f"{prefix}_order_plan_v1_*.json")

    dated_tags = {
        "orders": extract_date_tag(orders_path),
        "tickets": extract_date_tag(tickets_path),
        "journal": extract_date_tag(journal_path),
        "order_plan": extract_date_tag(order_plan_path),
    }
    unique_tags = sorted({value for value in dated_tags.values() if value})
    profile_date_tag = unique_tags[0] if len(unique_tags) == 1 else ""

    issues: list[str] = []
    if not account_latest.exists():
        issues.append("missing_account_latest")
    elif not is_recent_mtime(account_latest, now):
        issues.append("stale_account_latest")
    if not positions_latest.exists():
        issues.append("missing_positions_latest")
    elif not is_recent_mtime(positions_latest, now):
        issues.append("stale_positions_latest")
    for kind, path in {
        "orders": orders_path,
        "tickets": tickets_path,
        "journal": journal_path,
        "order_plan": order_plan_path,
    }.items():
        if path is None:
            issues.append(f"missing_{kind}")
    if len(unique_tags) > 1:
        issues.append("dated_artifact_tag_mismatch")
    elif not profile_date_tag:
        issues.append("missing_profile_date_tag")
    elif not is_recent_date_tag(profile_date_tag, now):
        issues.append("stale_profile_date_tag")

    return {
        "profile_slug": profile_slug,
        "date_tag": profile_date_tag,
        "runtime_ready": not issues,
        "issues": issues,
        "artifacts": {
            "account_latest": str(account_latest) if account_latest.exists() else None,
            "positions_latest": str(positions_latest) if positions_latest.exists() else None,
            "orders": str(orders_path) if orders_path else None,
            "tickets": str(tickets_path) if tickets_path else None,
            "journal": str(journal_path) if journal_path else None,
            "order_plan": str(order_plan_path) if order_plan_path else None,
        },
        "dated_tags": dated_tags,
    }


def load_scheduler_config() -> dict[str, Any]:
    return load_json(SCHEDULER_CONFIG_PATH) if SCHEDULER_CONFIG_PATH.exists() else {}


def load_governance_gate_status(now: datetime) -> dict[str, Any]:
    path = REPORT_DIR / "strategy_governance_gate_latest.json"
    if not path.exists():
        return {
            "report_status": "MISSING",
            "blocking": True,
            "issues": ["missing_governance_gate_report"],
            "path": None,
            "generated_at": "",
        }

    payload = load_json(path)
    if not payload:
        return {
            "report_status": "INVALID",
            "blocking": True,
            "issues": ["invalid_governance_gate_report"],
            "path": str(path),
            "generated_at": "",
        }

    report_status = str(payload.get("overall_status") or "UNKNOWN").upper()
    issues = [str(x).strip() for x in (payload.get("blocking_issues") or []) if str(x).strip()]
    if not is_recent_mtime(path, now):
        issues.append("stale_governance_gate_report")
    blocking = report_status != "PASS" or bool(issues)
    return {
        "report_status": report_status,
        "blocking": blocking,
        "issues": issues,
        "path": str(path),
        "generated_at": str(payload.get("generated_at") or ""),
    }


def governance_blocking_entries(governance_status: dict[str, Any]) -> list[str]:
    if not governance_status.get("blocking"):
        return []
    governance_issues = governance_status.get("issues") or []
    if governance_issues:
        return [f"governance:{issue}" for issue in governance_issues]
    return [f"governance:status_{str(governance_status.get('report_status') or 'UNKNOWN').lower()}"]


def manual_review_closure_alert_status(now: datetime) -> dict[str, Any]:
    path = REPORT_DIR / "manual_review_closure_alert_latest.json"
    if not path.exists():
        return {
            "status": "MISSING",
            "issues": ["missing_manual_review_closure_alert"],
            "path": None,
        }
    payload = load_json(path)
    if not payload:
        return {
            "status": "INVALID",
            "issues": ["invalid_manual_review_closure_alert"],
            "path": str(path),
        }
    issues: list[str] = []
    if not is_recent_mtime(path, now):
        issues.append("stale_manual_review_closure_alert")
    overall_status = str(payload.get("overall_status") or "UNKNOWN").upper()
    if overall_status == "YELLOW":
        issues.append(str(payload.get("reason") or "manual_review_closure_alert"))
    elif overall_status == "RED":
        issues.append(str(payload.get("reason") or "manual_review_closure_alert_escalated"))
    return {
        "status": overall_status,
        "issues": issues,
        "path": str(path),
        "closure_rate_48h": payload.get("closure_rate_48h"),
    }


def incident_registry_status(now: datetime) -> dict[str, Any]:
    path = REPORT_DIR / "incident_registry_latest.json"
    weekly_path = REPORT_DIR / "incident_weekly_review_latest.json"
    if not path.exists():
        return {
            "status": "MISSING",
            "issues": ["missing_incident_registry"],
            "path": None,
            "weekly_review_path": str(weekly_path) if weekly_path.exists() else None,
        }
    payload = load_json(path)
    if not payload:
        return {
            "status": "INVALID",
            "issues": ["invalid_incident_registry"],
            "path": str(path),
            "weekly_review_path": str(weekly_path) if weekly_path.exists() else None,
        }
    issues: list[str] = []
    if not is_recent_mtime(path, now):
        issues.append("stale_incident_registry")
    if not weekly_path.exists():
        issues.append("missing_incident_weekly_review")
    elif not is_recent_mtime(weekly_path, now, max_age=timedelta(days=8)):
        issues.append("stale_incident_weekly_review")
    overall_status = str(payload.get("overall_status") or "UNKNOWN").upper()
    if overall_status != "PASS":
        issues.append(f"incident_registry_status={overall_status.lower()}")
    return {
        "status": overall_status,
        "issues": issues,
        "path": str(path),
        "weekly_review_path": str(weekly_path) if weekly_path.exists() else None,
        "incident_count_30d": payload.get("incident_count_30d"),
        "open_incident_count_30d": payload.get("open_incident_count_30d"),
    }


def intervention_audit_status(now: datetime) -> dict[str, Any]:
    path = REPORT_DIR / "risk_intervention_audit_latest.json"
    if not path.exists():
        return {
            "status": "MISSING",
            "issues": ["missing_risk_intervention_audit"],
            "path": None,
        }

    payload = load_json(path)
    if not payload:
        return {
            "status": "INVALID",
            "issues": ["invalid_risk_intervention_audit"],
            "path": str(path),
        }

    issues: list[str] = []
    if not is_recent_mtime(path, now):
        issues.append("stale_risk_intervention_audit")
    status = str(payload.get("status") or "UNKNOWN").upper()
    reason = str(payload.get("reason") or "").strip()
    if status == "YELLOW":
        issues.append(reason or "risk_intervention_audit_yellow")
    elif status == "RED":
        issues.append(reason or "risk_intervention_audit_red")
    return {
        "status": status,
        "issues": issues,
        "path": str(path),
        "reason": reason,
        "rows_missing_intervention_id": payload.get("rows_missing_intervention_id"),
        "latest_intervention_id": payload.get("latest_intervention_id"),
    }


def live_v1_cron_present() -> bool:
    try:
        proc = subprocess.run(
            ["crontab", "-l"],
            capture_output=True,
            text=True,
            check=False,
        )
    except Exception:
        return False
    if proc.returncode != 0:
        return False
    text = proc.stdout or ""
    return any(
        tag in text
        for tag in (
            "LIVE_V1_PREMARKET",
            "LIVE_V1_PRECHECK",
            "LIVE_V1_CLOSE",
            "LIVE_V2_PREMARKET",
            "LIVE_V2_PRECHECK",
            "LIVE_V2_CLOSE",
        )
    )


def main() -> None:
    now = datetime.now()
    date_tag = now.strftime("%Y%m%d")
    incident_registry_mod.sync_registry(write=True)

    summary_path = (
        latest_file("qlib_breadth_long_turnover_hardcap_relaxed_tuned_summary_*.json")
        or latest_file("qlib_breadth_long_turnover_hardcap_relaxed_summary_*.json")
    )
    summary = load_json(summary_path)
    selected = summary.get("selected", {})

    annual = float(selected.get("annual_return_pct", 0.0) or 0.0)
    mdd = float(selected.get("max_drawdown_pct", 0.0) or 0.0)
    sharpe = float(selected.get("sharpe", 0.0) or 0.0)
    robust_pass = bool(selected.get("robust_pass", False))

    target_hit = annual >= 40.0 and mdd <= 25.0 and robust_pass
    strategy_health_status = "PASS" if target_hit else "WARN"

    auto_precheck_path = latest_file("auto_premarket_precheck_*.json")
    auto_precheck = load_json(auto_precheck_path)
    precheck_status = str(auto_precheck.get("status", "unknown")) if auto_precheck else "missing"

    strict_gate_enabled = False
    if LIVE_EXEC_PATH.exists():
        code = LIVE_EXEC_PATH.read_text(encoding="utf-8")
        strict_gate_enabled = "--strict-precheck" in code and "if not precheck.passed" in code

    dashboard_path = REPORT_DIR / "paper_profiles_comparison_latest.html"
    dashboard_fresh = is_recent_mtime(dashboard_path, now, max_age=OBSERVE_WINDOW)

    profile_status = {slug: profile_runtime_status(slug, now) for slug in PROFILE_SLUGS}
    manual_reviews = {slug: manual_review_status(slug, now) for slug in PROFILE_SLUGS}
    governance_status = load_governance_gate_status(now)
    manual_closure_status = manual_review_closure_alert_status(now)
    incident_status = incident_registry_status(now)
    intervention_status = intervention_audit_status(now)
    paper_date_tags = [item.get("date_tag") for item in profile_status.values() if item.get("date_tag")]
    paper_date_tag = paper_date_tags[0] if len(set(paper_date_tags)) == 1 and paper_date_tags else ""

    blocking_issues: list[str] = []
    for slug, payload in profile_status.items():
        for issue in payload.get("issues", []):
            blocking_issues.append(f"{slug}:{issue}")
    for slug, payload in manual_reviews.items():
        for issue in payload.get("issues", []):
            blocking_issues.append(f"{slug}:{issue}")
    if not dashboard_fresh:
        blocking_issues.append("comparison_dashboard_stale")
    if paper_date_tags and len(set(paper_date_tags)) > 1:
        blocking_issues.append("paper_profile_cross_tag_mismatch")
    if not paper_date_tag:
        blocking_issues.append("paper_profile_common_date_missing")
    blocking_issues.extend(governance_blocking_entries(governance_status))
    for issue in incident_status.get("issues", []):
        blocking_issues.append(f"incident:{issue}")
    for issue in intervention_status.get("issues", []):
        blocking_issues.append(f"intervention:{issue}")
    for issue in manual_closure_status.get("issues", []):
        blocking_issues.append(f"manual_review_closure:{issue}")

    scheduler_cfg = load_scheduler_config()
    paper_profiles_enabled = bool(scheduler_cfg.get("paper_profiles_enabled", False))
    auto_rule_enabled = live_v1_cron_present() if paper_profiles_enabled else False

    paper_runtime_ready = not blocking_issues
    live_runtime_ready = bool(
        auto_rule_enabled
        and strict_gate_enabled
        and is_operational_precheck_status(precheck_status)
    )

    runtime_ready = paper_runtime_ready
    overall = "PASS" if runtime_ready else "ALERT"

    result = AuditResult(
        date_tag=date_tag,
        annual_return_pct=annual,
        max_drawdown_pct=mdd,
        sharpe=sharpe,
        robust_pass=robust_pass,
        target_hit=target_hit,
        strategy_health_status=strategy_health_status,
        precheck_status=precheck_status,
        auto_rule_enabled=auto_rule_enabled,
        strict_gate_enabled=strict_gate_enabled,
        runtime_ready=runtime_ready,
        dashboard_fresh=dashboard_fresh,
        overall_status=overall,
        execution_scope="paper_profiles_only",
        paper_date_tag=paper_date_tag,
        paper_runtime_ready=paper_runtime_ready,
        live_runtime_ready=live_runtime_ready,
        paper_profiles_enabled=paper_profiles_enabled,
        profile_status=profile_status,
        manual_review_status=manual_reviews,
        governance_status=governance_status,
        incident_status=incident_status,
        intervention_status=intervention_status,
        blocking_issues=blocking_issues,
    )

    out_json = REPORT_DIR / f"daily_strategy_audit_{date_tag}.json"
    out_md = REPORT_DIR / f"daily_strategy_audit_{date_tag}.md"

    out_json.write_text(json.dumps(result.__dict__, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2), encoding="utf-8")

    md = [
        f"# 每日策略审计（{date_tag}）",
        "",
        f"- 总体状态：`{result.overall_status}`（按三套模拟盘主链判定）",
        f"- 模拟盘运行状态：`{'PASS' if result.paper_runtime_ready else 'ALERT'}` | 公共日期：`{result.paper_date_tag or '-'}`",
        f"- 策略健康度：`{result.strategy_health_status}`",
        f"- 目标达成：`{result.target_hit}`（仅用于策略健康度，年化>=40、回撤<=25、robust_pass=true）",
        "",
        "## 执行口径",
        f"- execution_scope：`{result.execution_scope}`",
        f"- 三盘自动调度已启用（观察项）：`{result.paper_profiles_enabled}`",
        f"- 模拟盘对比面板在观察窗口内更新：`{result.dashboard_fresh}`",
        f"- 实盘自动化准备度（观察项）：`{result.live_runtime_ready}`",
        f"- 最近一次自动盘前检查状态（观察项）：`{result.precheck_status}`",
        f"- HEARTBEAT 中保留旧自动规则：`{result.auto_rule_enabled}`",
        f"- strict precheck 门仍存在：`{result.strict_gate_enabled}`",
        "",
        "## 策略健康度",
        f"- 回测指标：年化 `{result.annual_return_pct:.2f}%`，回撤 `{result.max_drawdown_pct:.2f}%`，夏普 `{result.sharpe:.3f}`",
        f"- robust_pass：`{result.robust_pass}`",
        "",
        "## 三盘运行快照",
    ]

content.text:
#!/usr/bin/env python3
from __future__ import annotations

import argparse
import json
import re
import shutil
import subprocess
from datetime import datetime
from pathlib import Path
from typing import Any

import pandas as pd

PROJECT_ROOT = Path(__file__).resolve().parents[1]
REPORT_DIR = PROJECT_ROOT / "research" / "reports"
DEFAULT_CONFIGS = [
    PROJECT_ROOT / "config" / "strategy_probe_guard_defensive_v1.json",
    PROJECT_ROOT / "config" / "strategy_probe_guard_balanced_v1.json",
    PROJECT_ROOT / "config" / "strategy_probe_guard_aggressive_v1.json",
]


def load_json(path: Path) -> dict[str, Any]:
    return json.loads(path.read_text(encoding="utf-8")) if path.exists() else {}


def latest_date_tag() -> str:
    files = sorted(REPORT_DIR.glob("paper_*_probe_guard_*.json"))
    if not files:
        return datetime.now().strftime("%Y%m%d")
    digits = re.findall(r"(\d{8})", files[-1].name)
    return digits[-1] if digits else datetime.now().strftime("%Y%m%d")


def push_feishu(message: str) -> tuple[bool, str]:
    openclaw_bin = shutil.which("openclaw")
    if not openclaw_bin:
        return False, "openclaw_cli_missing"
    cmd = [
        openclaw_bin,
        "message",
        "send",
        "--channel",
        "feishu",
        "--account",
        "main",
        "--target",
        "user:ou_968a615509dc191f04220e18cda67080",
        "-m",
        message,
    ]
    try:
        proc = subprocess.run(cmd, capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=120)
    except Exception as exc:
        return False, f"push_failed:{exc}"
    detail = ((proc.stdout or "").strip() or (proc.stderr or "").strip())[-2000:]
    return proc.returncode == 0, detail


def main() -> None:
    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(description="汇总三套 profile guard 状态")
    parser.add_argument("--date", default="")
    parser.add_argument("--push", action="store_true")
    args = parser.parse_args()

    date_tag = args.date.strip() or latest_date_tag()
    rows: list[dict[str, Any]] = []

    for cfg_path in DEFAULT_CONFIGS:
        cfg = load_json(cfg_path)
        profile_slug = str(cfg.get("profile_slug") or "").strip()
        # T05 fix: first try _latest.json (most recent result), fall back to dated file
        dated_path = REPORT_DIR / f"paper_{profile_slug}_probe_guard_{date_tag}.json"
        latest_path = REPORT_DIR / f"paper_{profile_slug}_probe_guard_latest.json"
        report_path = latest_path if latest_path.exists() else (dated_path if dated_path.exists() else latest_path)
        payload = load_json(report_path)
        stats = payload.get("stats", {}) or {}
        issues = payload.get("issues", []) or []
        runtime_truth = payload.get("runtime_truth", {}) or {}
        rows.append(
            {
                "profile_slug": profile_slug,
                "profile_name": cfg.get("profile_name", profile_slug),
                "status": payload.get("status", "NO_DATA"),
                "tomorrow_mode": payload.get("tomorrow_mode", "-"),
                "runtime_truth_state": runtime_truth.get("state"),
                "trading_status": runtime_truth.get("trading_status"),
                "can_execute_today": runtime_truth.get("can_execute_today"),
                "buy_authorized": runtime_truth.get("buy_authorized"),
                "blocking_reason": runtime_truth.get("blocking_reason"),
                "planned_orders": stats.get("planned_orders", 0),
                "journal_records": stats.get("journal_records", 0),
                "position_count": stats.get("position_count", 0),
                "nav": stats.get("nav", 0.0),
                "max_drawdown_pct": stats.get("max_drawdown_pct", 0.0),
                "trailing_20d_return_pct": stats.get("trailing_20d_return_pct", 0.0),
                "trailing_20d_sharpe": stats.get("trailing_20d_sharpe", 0.0),
                "avg_slippage": stats.get("avg_slippage", 0.0),
                "issue_count": len(issues),
                "issue_codes": ",".join(str(item.get("code", "")) for item in issues if item.get("code")),
                "report_json": str(report_path),
            }
        )

    df = pd.DataFrame(rows)
    status_rank = {"RED": 3, "YELLOW": 2, "GREEN": 1, "NO_DATA": 0}
    df["status_rank"] = df["status"].map(status_rank).fillna(0).astype(int)
    portfolio_status = df.sort_values(["status_rank", "profile_slug"], ascending=[False, True]).iloc[0]["status"] if not df.empty else "NO_DATA"
    halt_count = int((df["tomorrow_mode"] == "halt").sum()) if not df.empty else 0

    out_csv = REPORT_DIR / f"strategy_probe_guard_summary_{date_tag}.csv"
    out_json = REPORT_DIR / f"strategy_probe_guard_summary_{date_tag}.json"
    out_md = REPORT_DIR / f"strategy_probe_guard_summary_{date_tag}.md"
    latest_json = REPORT_DIR / "strategy_probe_guard_summary_latest.json"
    latest_md = REPORT_DIR / "strategy_probe_guard_summary_latest.md"

    export_df = df.drop(columns=["status_rank"]) if "status_rank" in df.columns else df
    export_df.to_csv(out_csv, index=False, encoding="utf-8-sig")
    payload = {
        "generated_at": datetime.now().strftime("%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S"),
        "date_tag": date_tag,
        "portfolio_status": portfolio_status,
        "halt_count": halt_count,
        "rows": export_df.to_dict(orient="records"),
        "files": {"csv": str(out_csv), "md": str(out_md)},
    }
    out_json.write_text(json.dumps(payload, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2), encoding="utf-8")
    latest_json.write_text(json.dumps(payload, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2), encoding="utf-8")

    md_lines = [
        f"# 三套 Profile Guard 总表（{date_tag}）",
        "",
        f"- 总状态: `{portfolio_status}`",
        f"- halt 数量: `{halt_count}` / `{len(df)}`",
        "",
        "## 明细",
        export_df.to_markdown(index=False),
        "",
    ]
    out_md.write_text("\n".join(md_lines) + "\n", encoding="utf-8")
    latest_md.write_text("\n".join(md_lines) + "\n", encoding="utf-8")

    if args.push:
        lines = [
            f"三套 Guard 总表｜{date_tag}",
            f"总状态: {portfolio_status}",
            f"halt 数量: {halt_count}/{len(df)}",
        ]
        for _, row in export_df.iterrows():
            lines.append(
                f"- {row['profile_slug']}: {row['status']} / {row['tomorrow_mode']} / issues={row['issue_codes'] or 'none'}"
            )
        lines.append(f"报告: {out_md}")
        ok, detail = push_feishu("\n".join(lines))
        payload["push"] = {"ok": ok, "detail": detail}
        out_json.write_text(json.dumps(payload, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2), encoding="utf-8")
        latest_json.write_text(json.dumps(payload, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2), encoding="utf-8")

    print(json.dumps({"status": "OK", "summary_csv": str(out_csv), "summary_md": str(out_md), "summary_json": str(out_json)}, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2))


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

def profile_update_state(profile_slug: str, *, expected_date_tag: str) -> dict[str, Any]: account_path = REPORT_DIR / f"paper_{profile_slug}_account_v1_latest.json" if not account_path.exists(): return { "status": "RED", "profile_slug": profile_slug, "latest_date_tag": "", "expected_date_tag": expected_date_tag, "reason": "missing_account_latest", } try: payload = json.loads(account_path.read_text(encoding="utf-8")) except Exception: return { "status": "RED", "profile_slug": profile_slug, "latest_date_tag": "", "expected_date_tag": expected_date_tag, "reason": "invalid_account_json", } latest_date_tag = str(payload.get("date_tag") or "").strip() return { "status": "GREEN" if latest_date_tag == expected_date_tag else "RED", "profile_slug": profile_slug, "latest_date_tag": latest_date_tag, "expected_date_tag": expected_date_tag, "reason": "ok" if latest_date_tag == expected_date_tag else f"stale_profile_date={latest_date_tag}", } def build_payload() -> dict[str, Any]: expected_report_date_tag = datetime.now().strftime("%Y%m%d") expected_trade_date = resolve_expected_trade_date(expected_report_date_tag) expected_trade_date_tag = expected_trade_date["date_tag"] incident_registry_mod.sync_registry(write=True) today_report = load_json(REPORT_DIR / "today_stock_strategy_report_latest.json") premarket_reviews = sorted(REPORT_DIR.glob("live_premarket_risk_v2_*.json")) premarket_review_path = premarket_reviews[-1] if premarket_reviews else None premarket_review = load_json(premarket_review_path) if premarket_review_path else {} guard_summary = load_json(REPORT_DIR / "strategy_probe_guard_summary_latest.json") perf_panel = load_json(REPORT_DIR / "strategy_performance_panel_latest.json") breadth_alert_raw = load_json(REPORT_DIR / "breadth_strict_oos_alert_state.json") breadth_alert = normalize_breadth_alert_state( breadth_alert_raw, expected_trade_date_tag=expected_trade_date_tag, ) runtime_state = load_json(REPORT_DIR / "runtime_risk_state_latest.json") future_leak_audit = load_json(REPORT_DIR / "future_leak_walkforward_audit_latest.json") intervention_rows = latest_report("live_close_review_v2_*.json") live_review = load_json(live_review_path) if live_review_path else {} exit_suite_reports = sorted(REPORT_DIR.glob("paper_exit_candidate_suite_*.json")) content.thinking:
**Analyzing data mismatches**

I think the performance panel might be outdated, as the legacy paper shows a date of 20260330. It could be that the control tower is stale because of the old rows. The main issue is an audit and date mismatch; the root cause seems to be that the latest file is chosen based on mtime, leading to a match with earlier files from 20260310, since reruns didn’t regenerate key artifacts. I might need to adjust the audit logic to focus on the latest date tag, rather than relying on old orders, which may not be actual runtime artifacts.

**Investigating file handling issues**

I’m starting to think there could be new issues with naming or processing the latest files. I need to search for how order plans, tickets, and orders are generated. It looks like the latest_file function might be returning the oldest files based on modification time since my sorting showed 20260310 as the latest. But I did find a newer order plan dated 20260330. It seems possible that the 20260310 file was modified after copying from the newer file. I really need to inspect the latest_file function further to identify the root cause.

content.text: I found a likely bug: the audit is picking “latest” dated artifacts by file mtime, not by the date embedded in the filename. Because some old 20260310 files were touched later, the audit thinks the three paper profiles have mixed tags even though the 20260401 accounts are present. I’m verifying the helper and the downstream generators now.

content.text: I verified a second layer of the problem: even if I fix the audit’s bad “latest by mtime” helper, the three profiles still have 20260401 account/journal files but only 20260330 order-plan / orders / tickets files. So the mismatch is partly a false-positive selector bug, and partly a chain design bug: the audit currently treats optional/no-trade artifacts as mandatory daily-dated artifacts. I’m checking the simulation/output scripts to decide the cleanest fix.

def write_trade_history(path: Path, trades_df: pd.DataFrame) -> bool:
    frame = build_trade_history_frame(trades_df)
    path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    frame.to_csv(path, index=False, encoding="utf-8-sig")
    return not frame.empty


def inject_ticket_pipeline_notes(rows: list[dict[str, Any]], *, pipeline_kind: str, generated_by: str, date_tag: str) -> list[dict[str, Any]]:
    out: list[dict[str, Any]] = []
    prefix = [
        f"pipeline_kind={pipeline_kind}",
        f"generated_by={generated_by}",
        f"generated_date={date_tag}",
    ]
    for row in rows:
        item = dict(row)
        existing = str(item.get("notes") or "").strip()
        item["notes"] = ";".join(prefix + ([existing] if existing else []))
        out.append(item)
    return out


def run_cmd(cmd: list[str]) -> dict[str, Any]:
    proc = subprocess.run(cmd, cwd=str(PROJECT_ROOT), capture_output=True, text=True)
    payload = {
        "cmd": cmd,
        "returncode": int(proc.returncode),
        "stdout": (proc.stdout or "").strip(),
        "stderr": (proc.stderr or "").strip(),
    }
    if proc.returncode != 0:
        raise RuntimeError(json.dumps(payload, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2))
    return payload


def find_latest_prior_account(report_dir: Path, date_tag: str, profile_slug: str = "") -> Path | None:
    candidates = sorted(report_dir.glob(account_glob(profile_slug)))
    dated = [path for path in candidates if re.search(r"\d{8}", path.name)]
    prior = [path for path in dated if extract_date_tag(path) < date_tag]
    return prior[-1] if prior else None


def load_positions_snapshot(path: Path | None) -> pd.DataFrame:
    if path is None or not path.exists():
        return pd.DataFrame(columns=["symbol", "quantity", "cost_price"])
    try:
        df = pd.read_csv(path)
    except Exception:
        return pd.DataFrame(columns=["symbol", "quantity", "cost_price"])
    if df.empty:
        return pd.DataFrame(columns=["symbol", "quantity", "cost_price"])

    out = pd.DataFrame()
    out["symbol"] = df.get("symbol", "").astype(str)
    out["quantity"] = pd.to_numeric(df.get("quantity", 0), errors="coerce").fillna(0).astype(int)
    out["cost_price"] = pd.to_numeric(df.get("cost_price", 0.0), errors="coerce").fillna(0.0)
    out = out[(out["symbol"].str.strip() != "") & (out["quantity"] > 0)].reset_index(drop=True)
    return out


def write_holdings_snapshot(path: Path, df: pd.DataFrame) -> None:
    path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    out = df.copy()
    if out.empty:
        out = pd.DataFrame(columns=["symbol", "quantity", "cost_price"])
    for col in ["symbol", "quantity", "cost_price"]:
        if col not in out.columns:
            out[col] = ""
    out[["symbol", "quantity", "cost_price"]].to_csv(path, index=False, encoding="utf-8-sig")


def resolve_pretrade_state(paper_cfg: dict[str, Any], date_tag: str) -> dict[str, Any]:
    profile_slug = profile_slug_from_config(paper_cfg)
    initial_cash = parse_float(paper_cfg.get("initial_cash"), 0.0)
    start_date_tag = parse_optional_date_tag(paper_cfg.get("start_date_tag", ""))
    if initial_cash <= 0:
        raise ValueError("paper trading config 的 initial_cash 必须大于 0")

    if start_date_tag and date_tag <= start_date_tag:
        return {
            "available_cash": initial_cash,
            "account_nav": initial_cash,
            "positions_df": pd.DataFrame(columns=["symbol", "quantity", "cost_price"]),
            "source": "initial_capital",
            "source_date_tag": "",
            "drawdown_pct": 0.0,
        }

    prior_account_path = find_latest_prior_account(REPORT_DIR, date_tag, profile_slug=profile_slug)
    if prior_account_path is None:
        return {
            "available_cash": initial_cash,
            "account_nav": initial_cash,
            "positions_df": pd.DataFrame(columns=["symbol", "quantity", "cost_price"]),
            "source": "initial_capital_fallback",
            "source_date_tag": "",
            "drawdown_pct": 0.0,
        }

    payload = load_json(prior_account_path)
    source_date_tag = extract_date_tag(prior_account_path)
    files = payload.get("files", {}) or {}
    positions_path = None
    if files.get("positions_dated"):
        candidate = Path(str(files.get("positions_dated")))
        positions_path = candidate if candidate.exists() else None
    if positions_path is None:
        fallback = report_path(REPORT_DIR, "positions_dated", profile_slug=profile_slug, date_tag=source_date_tag)
        positions_path = fallback if fallback.exists() else None

    positions_df = load_positions_snapshot(positions_path)
    available_cash = parse_float(payload.get("cash"), initial_cash)
    account_nav = parse_float(payload.get("nav"), available_cash)
    if available_cash <= 0:
        available_cash = max(account_nav, initial_cash)
    if account_nav <= 0:
        account_nav = max(available_cash, initial_cash)

    return {
        "available_cash": available_cash,
        "account_nav": account_nav,
        "positions_df": positions_df,
        "source": "prior_account_snapshot",
        "source_date_tag": source_date_tag,
        "source_file": str(prior_account_path),
        "drawdown_pct": parse_float(payload.get("drawdown_pct"), 0.0),
    }


def resolve_tickets_path(date_tag: str, tickets_arg: str) -> Path:
    if tickets_arg:
        path = resolve_path(tickets_arg)
        if not path.exists():
            raise FileNotFoundError(f"未找到指定票据文件: {path}")
        return path
    preferred = REPORT_DIR / f"paper_signal_tickets_{date_tag}.csv"
    if preferred.exists():
        return preferred
    dated = REPORT_DIR / f"stock_signal_tickets_live_{date_tag}.csv"
    if dated.exists():
        return dated
    legacy = REPORT_DIR / f"stock_signal_tickets_{date_tag}.csv"
    if legacy.exists():
        return legacy
    raise FileNotFoundError(f"缺少指定日期的票据文件: {dated}")


def materialize_profile_signal_chain(
    *,
    paper_cfg: dict[str, Any],
    state: dict[str, Any],
    date_tag: str,
    merged_signals_path: Path,
    risk_config_path: Path | None,
) -> dict[str, Any]:
    profile_slug = profile_slug_from_config(paper_cfg)
    live_config_path = resolve_path(str(paper_cfg.get("live_config", "config/live_trading_v1.json")))
    live_cfg = load_json(live_config_path)
    runtime_metrics = resolve_runtime_metrics(date_tag, live_cfg, profile_slug=profile_slug)
    lot_size = int(((live_cfg.get("execution", {}) or {}).get("lot_size", 100)) or 100)
    available_cash = round(float(state.get("available_cash", 0.0) or 0.0), 2)
    account_nav = round(float(state.get("account_nav", 0.0) or 0.0), 2)
    artifacts = build_profile_artifact_paths(profile_slug, date_tag)

    positions_df = state.get("positions_df", pd.DataFrame())
    if not isinstance(positions_df, pd.DataFrame):
        positions_df = pd.DataFrame(columns=["symbol", "quantity", "cost_price"])
    write_holdings_snapshot(artifacts["holdings_input"], positions_df)

    # 盘前/盘中生成当日下单计划时，只能使用“当前日期之前”的已落地成交，
    # 否则同日残留 journal 会被误读成历史成交，形成幽灵 BUY/SELL。
    trade_history_df = load_all_trade_rows(
        REPORT_DIR,
        profile_slug=profile_slug,
        end_date_tag=date_tag,
        include_end_date=False,
    )

        live_cfg=live_cfg,
        profile_slug=profile_slug,

    )
    effective_merged_signals_path = Path(

def load_json(path: Path) -> dict[str, Any]:
    return json.loads(path.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))


def enforce_trading_mode(expected_mode: str, cli_mode: str = "") -> str:
    cli_value = str(cli_mode or "").strip().lower()
    env_value = str(os.environ.get("TRADING_MODE", "")).strip().lower()
    resolved = cli_value or env_value
    if not resolved:
        raise ValueError(f"必须显式设置 TRADING_MODE={expected_mode} 或传入 --trading-mode {expected_mode}")
    if resolved != expected_mode:
        raise ValueError(f"TRADING_MODE={resolved} 与脚本模式 {expected_mode} 不一致")
    return resolved


def parse_float(value: Any, default: float = 0.0) -> float:
    try:
        return float(str(value).replace(",", "").strip())
    except Exception:
        return default


def parse_int(value: Any, default: int = 0) -> int:
    try:
        return int(float(str(value).replace(",", "").strip()))
    except Exception:
        return default


def round_cash(value: float) -> float:
    return round(float(value), 2)


def normalize_symbol(value: Any) -> str:
    raw = str(value or "").strip().upper()
    if not raw or raw == "NAN":
        return ""
    raw = raw.replace(".XSHG", ".SH").replace(".XSHE", ".SZ")
    if raw.endswith((".SH", ".SZ", ".BJ", ".HK")):
        return raw
    if raw.startswith("SH") and len(raw) >= 8:
        return f"{raw[2:8]}.SH"
    if raw.startswith("SZ") and len(raw) >= 8:
        return f"{raw[2:8]}.SZ"
    if raw.isdigit() and len(raw) == 6:
        market = "SH" if raw.startswith(("5", "6", "9")) else "SZ"
        return f"{raw}.{market}"
    return raw


def normalize_side(value: Any) -> str:
    text = str(value or "").strip().upper()
    if text in {"BUY", "SELL"}:
        return text
    if any(token in text for token in ["买", "B"]):
        return "BUY"
    if any(token in text for token in ["卖", "S"]):
        return "SELL"
    return text


def to_joinquant_symbol(value: Any) -> str:
    symbol = normalize_symbol(value)
    if symbol.endswith(".SH"):
        return symbol[:-3] + ".XSHG"
    if symbol.endswith(".SZ"):
        return symbol[:-3] + ".XSHE"
    return symbol


def derive_exit_metadata(
    side: Any,
    signal_reason: Any,
    notes: Any = "",
    exit_type: Any = "",
    exit_reason: Any = "",
) -> tuple[str, str]:
    normalized_side = normalize_side(side)
    signal_text = str(signal_reason or "").strip()
    notes_text = str(notes or "").strip()
    resolved_exit_type = str(exit_type or "").strip()
    resolved_exit_reason = str(exit_reason or "").strip()
    if normalized_side != "SELL":
        return resolved_exit_type, resolved_exit_reason

    if not resolved_exit_reason:
        resolved_exit_reason = signal_text or notes_text

    if not resolved_exit_type:
        match = re.search(r"(?:^|[;\s])exit_type=([^;\s]+)", notes_text, flags=re.IGNORECASE)
        if match:
            resolved_exit_type = str(match.group(1) or "").strip().lower()
    if not resolved_exit_type and signal_text.lower().startswith("exit_engine:"):
        tail = signal_text.split(":", 1)[1].strip()
        resolved_exit_type = tail.split(None, 1)[0].strip().lower() if tail else ""
    return resolved_exit_type, resolved_exit_reason

content.text:
The current evidence is pretty clear now:

1) `daily_strategy_audit` is definitely wrong because it selects “latest” by file mtime, which pulled old `20260310` / `20260330` artifacts into the 20260401 audit.  
2) The 20260401 backfill only refreshed `account / positions / journal`; it did **not** refresh `order_plan / orders / tickets / trading_metrics / probe_guard`, so the other reports stayed on 20260330.

I’m checking whether those missing 20260401 support artifacts can be regenerated safely from the existing chain; if not, I’ll make the audit/date gate stop treating them as the same class of mandatory artifact and produce a new explicit repair report with the remaining blocker.

content.text:
parser.add_argument("--tickets", default="", help="可选：指定信号票据 csv")
    parser.add_argument("--merged-signals", default="", help="可选：指定 merged_signals csv；未传 tickets 时用于自动生成 profile 专属票据")
    parser.add_argument("--risk-config", default="", help="可选：显式指定 risk config；未传则直接使用 live_config 内的 risk")
    args = parser.parse_args()

    paper_cfg = load_json(resolve_path(args.config))
    execution_config_path = resolve_path(str(paper_cfg.get("execution_config", "config/paper_live_trading_v1.json")))
    execution_cfg = load_json(execution_config_path)
    profile_slug = profile_slug_from_config(paper_cfg)
    profile_name = profile_name_from_config(paper_cfg)

    date_tag = parse_date_tag(args.date) if args.date else datetime.now().strftime("%Y%m%d")
    state = resolve_pretrade_state(paper_cfg, date_tag)
    signal_materialization: dict[str, Any]
    if args.tickets:
        tickets_path = resolve_tickets_path(date_tag, args.tickets)
        signal_materialization = {
            "source": "explicit_tickets",
            "candidate_tickets": str(tickets_path),
        }
    else:
        signal_materialization = materialize_profile_signal_chain(
            paper_cfg=paper_cfg,
            state=state,
            date_tag=date_tag,
            merged_signals_path=resolve_merged_signals_path(date_tag, args.merged_signals),
            risk_config_path=resolve_path(args.risk_config) if str(args.risk_config or "").strip() else None,
        )
        tickets_path = Path(str(signal_materialization["candidate_tickets"])).resolve()

    holdings_dated = report_path(REPORT_DIR, "execution_holdings_dated", profile_slug=profile_slug, date_tag=date_tag)
    holdings_latest = report_path(REPORT_DIR, "execution_holdings_latest", profile_slug=profile_slug)
    write_holdings_snapshot(holdings_dated, state["positions_df"])
    write_holdings_snapshot(holdings_latest, state["positions_df"])

    holdings_map = load_holdings_map(holdings_dated)
    adv20_map = load_adv20_map(A_STOCK_CSV, min_trade_date="2020-01-01")
    runtime_metrics = resolve_runtime_metrics(date_tag, execution_cfg, profile_slug=profile_slug)

    # ===== CSV 数据新鲜度校验（防控 T-1 数据被误用）====
    csv_index_file = INDEX_DATA_ROOT / "index_000852_SH.csv"
    csv_data_stale_warning = ""
    csv_index_is_stale = False
    last_csv_date: int | None = None
    now_dt = datetime.now()
    today_int = int(now_dt.strftime("%Y%m%d"))
    if csv_index_file.exists():
        import pandas as pd
        df_idx = pd.read_csv(csv_index_file)
        last_csv_date = int(df_idx.iloc[-1]["trade_date"])
        if last_csv_date < today_int:
            csv_index_is_stale = True

    live_payload = runtime_metrics["live_payload"]
    index_ret_pct = float(runtime_metrics.get("index_ret_pct", 0.0) or 0.0)
    market_breadth = runtime_metrics.get("market_breadth")
    csv_freshness_guard = {
        "csv_index_is_stale": csv_index_is_stale,
        "last_csv_date": last_csv_date,
        "today_int": today_int,
        "realtime_index_available": abs(index_ret_pct) > 1e-9,
        "realtime_breadth_available": market_breadth is not None,
        "action": "none",
        "reason": "",
    }
    if csv_index_is_stale and abs(index_ret_pct) <= 1e-9:
        csv_data_stale_warning = (
            f"[WARN] CSV 指数数据陈旧（最后日期={last_csv_date}，今日={today_int}），"
            "实时指数口径也不可用，风控判断存在失真风险。"
        )
        print(csv_data_stale_warning, file=sys.stderr)
        csv_freshness_guard["reason"] = csv_data_stale_warning
    elif csv_index_is_stale:
        csv_data_stale_warning = (
            f"[INFO] CSV 指数日线陈旧（最后日期={last_csv_date}，今日={today_int}），"
            f"本次已切换实时指数口径 index_ret_pct={index_ret_pct:.4f}%"
        )
        csv_freshness_guard["action"] = "realtime_override"
        csv_freshness_guard["reason"] = csv_data_stale_warning
    runtime = evaluate_runtime_state_for_date(
        config=execution_cfg,
        live_payload=live_payload,
        date_tag=date_tag,
        index_ret_pct=index_ret_pct,
        market_breadth=market_breadth,
    )
    runtime = apply_cached_runtime_truth(runtime, runtime_metrics, date_tag=date_tag)
    gray_context = apply_gray_policy(
        config=execution_cfg,
        available_cash=float(state["available_cash"]),
        runtime=runtime,
    )

    # ===== 盘中实时大盘门禁 =====
    # 在生成买入推荐前，先检查当日实时大盘状态
    # 如果是今日且在交易时段，用实时指数门禁覆盖旧的口径
    intraday_gate = get_intraday_market_state(date_tag)
    intraday_gate_applied = False

    if intraday_gate.get("enabled"):
        gate_action = intraday_gate.get("gate_action", "none")
        if gate_action == "halt":
            # 盘中 4/4 指数下跌，直接 halt
            runtime.mode = "halt"
            runtime.risk_off = True
            runtime.hard_stop = True
            runtime.halt_new_buy = True
            runtime.halt_reason = f"盘中门禁触发 halt: {intraday_gate.get('reason', '')}"
            runtime.gate_reasons = runtime.gate_reasons or []
            runtime.gate_reasons.append("intraday_market_halt")
            intraday_gate_applied = True
        elif gate_action == "cautious":
            # 盘中 2/4 指数下跌，降级到 cautious
            if runtime.mode not in ["halt"]:
                runtime.mode = "cautious"
                if not runtime.risk_off:
                    runtime.risk_off = True
                runtime.gate_reasons = runtime.gate_reasons or []
                runtime.gate_reasons.append("intraday_market_cautious")
                intraday_gate_applied = True
    else:
        # === 盘前门禁（当日开盘前）：
        # intraday_gate.enabled=False 发生在：(1) 非交易时段 (2) 午间休市
        # 盘前场景：CSV 数据仍为 T-1 日数据（次日开盘前不会更新），
        # 导致基于今日指数收益率的 halt 判断失效。
        # 修复：若上一个交易日收盘后的 intraday recheck 已记录 halt_new_buy=True，
        # 则在盘前生成订单时也要继承该标志，防止用旧数据通过风控。
        is_same_day = date_tag == now_dt.strftime("%Y%m%d")
        is_preopen_today = is_same_day and now_dt.strftime("%H%M") < "0930"
        prev_date_tag = (
            str(int(date_tag) - 1)
            if is_preopen_today and len(date_tag) == 8
            else None
        )
        if prev_date_tag and not runtime.halt_new_buy and not runtime.hard_stop:
            prev_rt_path = REPORT_DIR / f"intraday_risk_recheck_{prev_date_tag}_2359.json"
            if not prev_rt_path.exists():
                candidates = sorted(REPORT_DIR.glob(f"intraday_risk_recheck_{prev_date_tag}_*.json"))
                prev_rt_path = candidates[-1] if candidates else None
            if prev_rt_path and prev_rt_path.exists():
                try:
                    prev_rt = json.loads(prev_rt_path.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
                    prev_lr = prev_rt.get("latest_runtime") or {}
                    if bool(prev_lr.get("halt_new_buy")):
                        runtime.mode = "halt"
                        runtime.risk_off = True
                        runtime.hard_stop = True
                        runtime.halt_new_buy = True
                        runtime.halt_reason = (
                            f"前日盘后门禁 halt 延续（{prev_rt.get('generated_at','?')}）："
                            f"{prev_lr.get('halt_reason', '未知原因')}"
                        )
                        runtime.gate_reasons = runtime.gate_reasons or []
                        runtime.gate_reasons.append("prev_day_intraday_halt_continuation")
                        csv_freshness_guard["action"] = "block_prev_day_halt_continuation"
                        csv_freshness_guard["reason"] = runtime.halt_reason
                        intraday_gate_applied = False  # 盘前继承，非盘中触发
                except Exception:
                    pass

        if (
            is_preopen_today
            and csv_index_is_stale
            and abs(index_ret_pct) <= 1e-9
            and not runtime.halt_new_buy
        ):
            runtime.mode = "halt"
            runtime.risk_off = True
            runtime.hard_stop = True
            runtime.halt_new_buy = True
            runtime.halt_reason = (
                f"CSV 指数数据陈旧（最后日期={last_csv_date}，今日={today_int}），且盘前无可靠实时指数口径，"
                "禁止继续按旧数据生成新增买入。"
            )
            runtime.gate_reasons = runtime.gate_reasons or []
            runtime.gate_reasons.append("csv_index_stale_preopen_halt")
            csv_freshness_guard["action"] = "block"
            csv_freshness_guard["reason"] = runtime.halt_reason

apply_cmd.extend(["--market-breadth", str(runtime_metrics.get("market_breadth"))])
    if risk_config_path is not None:
        apply_cmd.extend(["--risk-config", str(risk_config_path)])
    apply_out = run_cmd(apply_cmd)

    stock_analysis_overlay = apply_stock_analysis_overlay(
        candidate_orders_path=artifacts["candidate_orders"],
        report_dir=REPORT_DIR,
        date_tag=date_tag,
        profile_slug=profile_slug,
        scope="paper",
        overlay_rule_profile=EXECUTION_OVERLAY_PROFILE,
    )
    ticket_rows, ticket_stats = build_ticket_rows(
        source_kind="merged_proposed_orders",
        source_path=artifacts["candidate_orders"],
        date_tag=date_tag,
        account_nav=account_nav,
        lot_size=max(1, lot_size),
    )
    ticket_rows = inject_ticket_pipeline_notes(
        ticket_rows,
        pipeline_kind="paper",
        generated_by="prepare_paper_orders_v1.py",
        date_tag=date_tag,
    )
    write_ticket_rows(artifacts["tickets"], ticket_rows)

    return {
        "source": "profile_signal_chain",
        "date_tag": date_tag,
        "live_config": str(live_config_path),
        "risk_config": str(risk_config_path) if risk_config_path is not None else "",
        "base_merged_signals": str(merged_signals_path),
        "merged_signals": str(effective_merged_signals_path),
        "candidate_source_materialization": candidate_source_materialization,
        "candidate_approved": str(artifacts["approved"]),
        "candidate_orders": str(artifacts["candidate_orders"]),
        "candidate_tickets": str(artifacts["tickets"]),
        "holdings_input": str(artifacts["holdings_input"]),
        "trade_history_input": str(artifacts["trade_history"]),
        "available_cash": available_cash,
        "account_nav": account_nav,
        "ticket_rows": int(len(ticket_rows)),
        "ticket_stats": ticket_stats,
        "apply_risk_cmd": apply_out.get("cmd", []),
        "stock_analysis_overlay": stock_analysis_overlay,
    }


def write_brief(
    *,
    path: Path,
    date_tag: str,
    state: dict[str, Any],
    config_path: Path,
    tickets_path: Path,
    holdings_path: Path,
    orders_path: Path,
    stats: dict[str, Any],
    gray_context: dict[str, Any],
    market_breadth: float | None,
    index_ret_pct: float,
    signal_materialization: dict[str, Any] | None = None,
    intraday_gate: dict[str, Any] | None = None,
) -> None:
    signal_materialization = signal_materialization or {}
    intraday_gate = intraday_gate or {}
    lines = [
        f"# 模拟盘下单计划 v1（{date_tag}）",
        "",
        "## 纸面账户前置状态",
        f"- state_source：`{state.get('source', '-')}`",
        f"- source_date_tag：`{state.get('source_date_tag', '-') or '-'}`",
        f"- available_cash：`{round(parse_float(state.get('available_cash'), 0.0), 2)}`",
        f"- account_nav：`{round(parse_float(state.get('account_nav'), 0.0), 2)}`",
        f"- holdings_count：`{len(state.get('positions_df', pd.DataFrame()))}`",
        "",
        "## 风控执行状态",
        f"- config：`{config_path}`",

def main() -> None:
    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(description="纸面账户下单计划生成 v1")
    parser.add_argument(
        "--config",
        default=str(DEFAULT_CONFIG_PATH),
        help="纸面交易配置文件；默认使用 aggressive profile",
    )
    parser.add_argument("--date", default="", help="可选：YYYYMMDD 或 YYYY-MM-DD")
    parser.add_argument("--tickets", default="", help="可选：指定信号票据 csv")
    parser.add_argument("--merged-signals", default="", help="可选：指定 merged_signals csv；未传 tickets 时用于自动生成 profile 专属票据")
    parser.add_argument("--risk-config", default="", help="可选：显式指定 risk config；未传则直接使用 live_config 内的 risk")
    args = parser.parse_args()

    paper_cfg = load_json(resolve_path(args.config))
    execution_config_path = resolve_path(str(paper_cfg.get("execution_config", "config/paper_live_trading_v1.json")))
    execution_cfg = load_json(execution_config_path)
    profile_slug = profile_slug_from_config(paper_cfg)
    profile_name = profile_name_from_config(paper_cfg)

    date_tag = parse_date_tag(args.date) if args.date else datetime.now().strftime("%Y%m%d")
    state = resolve_pretrade_state(paper_cfg, date_tag)
    signal_materialization: dict[str, Any]
    if args.tickets:
        tickets_path = resolve_tickets_path(date_tag, args.tickets)
        signal_materialization = {
            "source": "explicit_tickets",
            "candidate_tickets": str(tickets_path),
        }
    else:
        signal_materialization = materialize_profile_signal_chain(
            paper_cfg=paper_cfg,
            state=state,
            date_tag=date_tag,
            merged_signals_path=resolve_merged_signals_path(date_tag, args.merged_signals),
            risk_config_path=resolve_path(args.risk_config) if str(args.risk_config or "").strip() else None,
        )
        tickets_path = Path(str(signal_materialization["candidate_tickets"])).resolve()

    holdings_dated = report_path(REPORT_DIR, "execution_holdings_dated", profile_slug=profile_slug, date_tag=date_tag)
    holdings_latest = report_path(REPORT_DIR, "execution_holdings_latest", profile_slug=profile_slug)
    write_holdings_snapshot(holdings_dated, state["positions_df"])
    write_holdings_snapshot(holdings_latest, state["positions_df"])

    holdings_map = load_holdings_map(holdings_dated)
    adv20_map = load_adv20_map(A_STOCK_CSV, min_trade_date="2020-01-01")
    runtime_metrics = resolve_runtime_metrics(date_tag, execution_cfg, profile_slug=profile_slug)

live_system_path = Path(
        str(
            runtime_metrics.get("live_system_path")
            or (REPORT_DIR / f"live_system_v1_{date_tag}.json")
        )
    )
    if not live_system_path.exists():
        return None
    try:
        live_payload = load_json(live_system_path)
    except Exception:
        return None

    cached_market_breadth = latest_runtime.get("market_breadth", runtime_metrics.get("market_breadth"))

    result: dict[str, Any] = {
        "market_breadth": sanitize_cached_market_breadth(payload, cached_market_breadth),
        "index_ret_pct": latest_runtime.get("index_ret_pct", runtime_metrics.get("index_ret_pct")),
        "strategy_max_dd_pct": runtime_metrics.get("strategy_max_dd_pct"),
        "strategy_sharpe": runtime_metrics.get("strategy_sharpe"),
        "benchmark_code": snapshot_benchmark or expected_benchmark,
        "live_system_path": str(live_system_path),
        "live_payload": live_payload,
        "runtime_latest": latest_runtime,
        "runtime_truth": (latest_runtime.get("runtime_truth") or {}),
        "source": f"runtime_risk_state_latest{('_' + profile_slug) if use_panel_level else ''}",
        "profile_slug": profile_slug,
        "panel_level_risk": use_panel_level,
    }

    # Apply panel-level threshold override: replace the global strategy_max_dd_pct
    # with the panel-specific risk-off threshold so that the halt gate is evaluated
    # against this panel's tolerance instead of the shared global truth.
    if use_panel_level:
        panel_risk_cfg = profile_runtime_risk_config(profile_slug)
        panel_dd_riskoff = panel_risk_cfg.get("strategy_max_drawdown_riskoff_pct")
        panel_dd_halt = panel_risk_cfg.get("strategy_max_drawdown_halt_pct")
        result["panel_strategy_max_dd_riskoff_pct"] = panel_dd_riskoff
        result["panel_strategy_max_dd_halt_pct"] = panel_dd_halt
        # Patch runtime_truth halt_new_buy logic: use panel threshold
        patched_truth = dict(result["runtime_truth"])
        global_dd = result["strategy_max_dd_pct"]
        if global_dd is not None and panel_dd_halt is not None:
            if float(global_dd) >= float(panel_dd_halt):
                patched_truth["halt_new_buy"] = True
                patched_truth["hard_stop"] = True
                patched_truth["risk_off"] = True
                patched_truth["halt_reason"] = (
                    f"panel_halt:{profile_slug}_max_drawdown_pct({global_dd}) >= {panel_dd_halt}"
                )
                patched_truth["state_reason"] = patched_truth["halt_reason"]
                patched_truth["trading_status"] = "BUY_HALT"
                patched_truth["trading_status_reason"] = patched_truth["halt_reason"]
                patched_truth["trading_status_label_cn"] = "禁止买入"
                patched_truth["buy_authorized"] = False
                patched_truth["gate_reasons"] = [
                    f"panel_halt:{profile_slug}_max_drawdown_pct({global_dd}) >= {panel_dd_halt}"
                ]
            elif float(global_dd) >= float(panel_dd_riskoff):
                patched_truth["halt_new_buy"] = False
                patched_truth["hard_stop"] = False
                patched_truth["risk_off"] = True
                patched_truth["halt_reason"] = (
                    f"panel_riskoff:{profile_slug}_max_drawdown_pct({global_dd}) >= {panel_dd_riskoff}"
                )
                patched_truth["state_reason"] = patched_truth["halt_reason"]
                patched_truth["trading_status"] = "RISK_OFF"
                patched_truth["trading_status_reason"] = patched_truth["halt_reason"]
                patched_truth["trading_status_label_cn"] = "降低风险"
                patched_truth["buy_authorized"] = False
                patched_truth["gate_reasons"] = [
                    f"panel_riskoff:{profile_slug}_max_drawdown_pct({global_dd}) >= {panel_dd_riskoff}"
                ]
            else:
                patched_truth["halt_new_buy"] = False
                patched_truth["hard_stop"] = False
                patched_truth["risk_off"] = False
                patched_truth["halt_reason"] = ""
                patched_truth["state_reason"] = "panel_normal"
                patched_truth["trading_status"] = "NORMAL"
                patched_truth["trading_status_reason"] = "panel_normal"
                patched_truth["trading_status_label_cn"] = "正常"
                patched_truth["buy_authorized"] = True
                patched_truth["gate_reasons"] = []
        result["runtime_truth"] = patched_truth

    return result


def resolve_runtime_metrics(date_tag: str, config: dict[str, Any], *, profile_slug: str = "") -> dict[str, Any]:
    cached = load_cached_runtime_metrics(date_tag, config, profile_slug=profile_slug)
    if cached is not None:
        return cached
    return load_runtime_metrics_for_date(date_tag, config, report_dir=REPORT_DIR)


def apply_cached_runtime_truth(runtime: Any, runtime_metrics: dict[str, Any], *, date_tag: str) -> Any:
    if str(getattr(runtime, "date_tag", "") or "") != str(date_tag):
        return runtime

    runtime_truth = runtime_metrics.get("runtime_truth") or {}
    runtime_latest = runtime_metrics.get("runtime_latest") or {}
    source = runtime_metrics.get("source", "")
    # Accept both the global source and panel-level sources (runtime_risk_state_latest_aggressive, etc.)
    is_cached = source == "runtime_risk_state_latest" or source.startswith("runtime_risk_state_latest_")
    if not is_cached:
        return runtime

    authoritative = runtime_truth if isinstance(runtime_truth, dict) and runtime_truth else runtime_latest
    if not isinstance(authoritative, dict) or not authoritative:
        return runtime

    runtime.mode = str(authoritative.get("mode") or getattr(runtime, "mode", "") or "")
    runtime.risk_off = bool(authoritative.get("risk_off", getattr(runtime, "risk_off", False)))
    runtime.hard_stop = bool(authoritative.get("hard_stop", getattr(runtime, "hard_stop", False)))
    runtime.halt_new_buy = bool(authoritative.get("halt_new_buy", getattr(runtime, "halt_new_buy", False)))
    runtime.halt_reason = str(
        authoritative.get("trading_status_reason")
        or authoritative.get("state_reason")

runtime.halt_reason = (
                f"CSV 指数数据陈旧（最后日期={last_csv_date}，今日={today_int}），且盘前无可靠实时指数口径，"
                "禁止继续按旧数据生成新增买入。"
            )
            runtime.gate_reasons = runtime.gate_reasons or []
            runtime.gate_reasons.append("csv_index_stale_preopen_halt")
            csv_freshness_guard["action"] = "block"
            csv_freshness_guard["reason"] = runtime.halt_reason

    rows, stats = size_orders(
        tickets_path=tickets_path,
        config=execution_cfg,
        available_cash=float(state["available_cash"]),
        account_nav=float(state["account_nav"]),
        runtime=runtime,
        holdings_map=holdings_map,
        adv20_map=adv20_map,
        allow_mirror_records=False,
        max_signal_age_days=2,
    )
    diagnostics_payload = build_order_diagnostics(
        profile_slug=profile_slug,
        date_tag=date_tag,
        signal_materialization=signal_materialization,
        stats=stats,
        rows=rows,
        runtime=runtime,
        state={"market_breadth": market_breadth},
    )
    diagnostics_files = write_order_diagnostics(
        profile_slug=profile_slug,
        date_tag=date_tag,
        payload=diagnostics_payload,
    )
    signal_materialization["order_diagnostics_json"] = diagnostics_files["json"]
    signal_materialization["order_diagnostics_md"] = diagnostics_files["md"]

    orders_path = report_path(REPORT_DIR, "orders", profile_slug=profile_slug, date_tag=date_tag)
    brief_path = report_path(REPORT_DIR, "execution_brief", profile_slug=profile_slug, date_tag=date_tag)
    plan_json_path = report_path(REPORT_DIR, "order_plan", profile_slug=profile_slug, date_tag=date_tag)
    write_orders(orders_path, rows)
    write_brief(
        path=brief_path,
        date_tag=date_tag,
        state=state,
        config_path=execution_config_path,
        tickets_path=tickets_path,
        holdings_path=holdings_dated,
        orders_path=orders_path,
        stats=stats,
        gray_context=gray_context,
        market_breadth=market_breadth,
        index_ret_pct=index_ret_pct,
        signal_materialization=signal_materialization,
        intraday_gate=intraday_gate,
    )

    payload = {
        "date_tag": date_tag,
        "trade_date": tag_to_iso(date_tag),
        "profile_slug": profile_slug,
        "profile_name": profile_name,
        "config": str(execution_config_path),
        "tickets": str(tickets_path),
        "pretrade_state": {
            "source": state.get("source", ""),
            "source_date_tag": state.get("source_date_tag", ""),
            "source_file": state.get("source_file", ""),
            "available_cash": round(parse_float(state.get("available_cash"), 0.0), 2),
            "account_nav": round(parse_float(state.get("account_nav"), 0.0), 2),
            "holdings_count": int(len(state.get("positions_df", pd.DataFrame()))),
        },
        "signal_materialization": signal_materialization,
        "stats": stats,
        "gray_context": gray_context,
        "intraday_gate": intraday_gate,
        "csv_freshness_guard": csv_freshness_guard,
        "files": {
            "orders": str(orders_path),
            "brief": str(brief_path),
            "holdings_snapshot": str(holdings_dated),
            "holdings_latest": str(holdings_latest),
            "stock_analysis_overlay_md": str((((signal_materialization.get("stock_analysis_overlay") or {}).get("files")) or {}).get("md", "")),
            "stock_analysis_overlay_json": str((((signal_materialization.get("stock_analysis_overlay") or {}).get("files")) or {}).get("json", "")),
            "order_diagnostics_json": diagnostics_files["json"],
            "order_diagnostics_md": diagnostics_files["md"],
        },
    }
    plan_json_path.write_text(json.dumps(payload, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2), encoding="utf-8")
    payload["files"]["plan_json"] = str(plan_json_path)
    print(json.dumps(payload, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2))


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

content.thinking:
**Adjusting guard report generation**

I can still generate guard reports with the date set to 20260401, but it feels like that might hide old support artifacts. I think it's better to tweak the run_strategy_probe_guard function to use the latest existing metrics and orders for the stats while keeping the source date tags visible. The report date tag should align with the current account date, which would help match the guard summary date with the account. But then, the user is asking for the current status regarding any premarket blocks.

content.text:
auto_precheck = load_json(auto_precheck_path)
    precheck_status = str(auto_precheck.get("status", "unknown")) if auto_precheck else "missing"

    strict_gate_enabled = False
    if LIVE_EXEC_PATH.exists():
        code = LIVE_EXEC_PATH.read_text(encoding="utf-8")
        strict_gate_enabled = "--strict-precheck" in code and "if not precheck.passed" in code

    dashboard_path = REPORT_DIR / "paper_profiles_comparison_latest.html"
    dashboard_fresh = is_recent_mtime(dashboard_path, now, max_age=OBSERVE_WINDOW)

    profile_status = {slug: profile_runtime_status(slug, now) for slug in PROFILE_SLUGS}
    manual_reviews = {slug: manual_review_status(slug, now) for slug in PROFILE_SLUGS}
    governance_status = load_governance_gate_status(now)
    manual_closure_status = manual_review_closure_alert_status(now)
    incident_status = incident_registry_status(now)
    intervention_status = intervention_audit_status(now)
    paper_date_tags = [item.get("date_tag") for item in profile_status.values() if item.get("date_tag")]
    paper_date_tag = paper_date_tags[0] if len(set(paper_date_tags)) == 1 and paper_date_tags else ""

    blocking_issues: list[str] = []
    for slug, payload in profile_status.items():
        for issue in payload.get("issues", []):
            blocking_issues.append(f"{slug}:{issue}")
    for slug, payload in manual_reviews.items():
        for issue in payload.get("issues", []):
            blocking_issues.append(f"{slug}:{issue}")
    if not dashboard_fresh:
        blocking_issues.append("comparison_dashboard_stale")
    if paper_date_tags and len(set(paper_date_tags)) > 1:
        blocking_issues.append("paper_profile_cross_tag_mismatch")
    if not paper_date_tag:
        blocking_issues.append("paper_profile_common_date_missing")
    blocking_issues.extend(governance_blocking_entries(governance_status))
    for issue in incident_status.get("issues", []):
        blocking_issues.append(f"incident:{issue}")
    for issue in intervention_status.get("issues", []):
        blocking_issues.append(f"intervention:{issue}")
    for issue in manual_closure_status.get("issues", []):
        blocking_issues.append(f"manual_review_closure:{issue}")

    scheduler_cfg = load_scheduler_config()
    paper_profiles_enabled = bool(scheduler_cfg.get("paper_profiles_enabled", False))
    auto_rule_enabled = live_v1_cron_present() if paper_profiles_enabled else False

    paper_runtime_ready = not blocking_issues
    live_runtime_ready = bool(
        auto_rule_enabled
        and strict_gate_enabled
        and is_operational_precheck_status(precheck_status)
    )

    runtime_ready = paper_runtime_ready
    overall = "PASS" if runtime_ready else "ALERT"

    result = AuditResult(
        date_tag=date_tag,
        annual_return_pct=annual,
        max_drawdown_pct=mdd,
        sharpe=sharpe,
        robust_pass=robust_pass,
        target_hit=target_hit,
        strategy_health_status=strategy_health_status,
        precheck_status=precheck_status,
        auto_rule_enabled=auto_rule_enabled,
        strict_gate_enabled=strict_gate_enabled,
        runtime_ready=runtime_ready,
        dashboard_fresh=dashboard_fresh,
        overall_status=overall,
        execution_scope="paper_profiles_only",
